final:
module RefModule
(
  input rst,
  input clk,

  output reg [31:0] count
);

    wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (rst) 
	begin
      count <= 32'b00000000000000000000000000000000;
    end 
	else 
	begin
      count <= count + 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
